allow: Bash(python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install "pytoyoda @ git+https://github.com/pytoyoda/pytoyoda@main" 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import inspect
from pytoyoda.models.vehicle import Vehicle
sig = inspect.signature\(Vehicle.get_trips\)
print\('get_trips signature:', sig\)
src = inspect.getsource\(Vehicle.get_trips\)
print\(src\)
")

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import inspect
from pytoyoda.models.trips import Trip
print\([m for m in dir\(Trip\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)
src = inspect.getsource\(Trip\)
print\(src[:3000]\)
")
